zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr於1430年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾艾藍德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden30歲，母親Lady Mary Ann Wood27歲。他於大約1456年與Mrs. Ramsden在英國英格蘭越可爾艾藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1525年在他的家鄉享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr于1430年出生在英国英格兰越可爾艾藍德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden30岁，母亲Lady Mary Ann Wood27岁。他于大约1456年与Mrs. Ramsden在英国英格兰越可爾艾藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1525年在他的家乡享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Ramsden in Cartworth, near Holmfirth (Yorkshire), recorded as Rommesdene in 1315 and Ramesdene in 1323. The placename derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes) or hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + denu ‘valley’.

habitational name from Ramsden in Benenden (Kent). The placename probably derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes), or perhaps an Old English personal name Ramm (genitive Rammes), + Old English denn ‘pasture’.

variants.name: Ramson
meanings: habitational name, either from Ramshorn in Bickington (Devon) or from Rampisham (Dorset).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr was born in 1430, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden, was 30 and his mother, Lady Mary Ann Wood, was 27. He married Mrs. Ramsden about 1456, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1525, in his hometown, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr est né en 1430, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Ann Wood, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Ramsden environ 1456, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr 1430 in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden 30 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Ann Wood 27. Er hat um 1456 in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Ramsden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1525 im Alter von 95 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr è nato il nel 1430 nel Elland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Ann Wood, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Ramsden circa 1456, nel Elland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ramsden Srが1430年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Moore Ramsdenは30歳，母Lady Mary Ann Woodは27歳であった。約1456年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドでMrs. Ramsdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1525年に故郷で95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Ann Wood(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 Mrs. Ramsden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 그의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr nasceu em 1430, em Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Ann Wood, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Ramsden aproximadamente 1456, em Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1525, em sua cidade natal, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr родился в 1430 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Ann Wood, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Ramsden около 1456 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1525 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr nació en 1430, en Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Moore Ramsden, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Ann Wood, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mrs. Ramsden aproximadamente 1456, en Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 95 años.
